About Me

Empowering UAE Businesses with
Seamless Tax Compliance

I am a dedicated Tax & Audit Specialist based in Dubai, UAE, with over 5 years of progressive experience in audit, taxation, and financial compliance. Currently serving as a Senior Audit Executive at Live Auditors & Chartered Accountants LLC, Ajman, I specialise in helping businesses navigate the complexities of the UAE's evolving regulatory landscape.

My expertise spans Corporate Tax, Value Added Tax (VAT), FTA Compliance, and statutory auditing — with a proven track record of managing 100+ end-to-end CT engagements and representing clients in FTA correspondences and penalty proceedings.

Currently pursuing my Chartered Accountancy (CA) qualification through the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI), I combine deep technical knowledge with strategic thinking to deliver clarity, confidence, and compliant growth for every client I serve.

Career Journey

Professional Experience

Jan 2026 – Present · 3 months
Senior Audit Executive
Live Auditors & CA's | Ajman, UAE
Current Role
Jan 2024 – Dec 2025 · 2 Years
Audit Executive
Live Auditors & CA's | Ajman, UAE
  • Spearheaded 100+ end-to-end Corporate Tax report preparations for Free Zone and mainland clients, including CT return filing, QFZP assessments, and Small Business Relief (SBR) evaluations.
  • Led VAT advisory and Tax Group registration support for multi-entity clients, with successful coordination across FTA portal issues, member alignment, and compliance documentation.
  • Drafted custom Transfer Pricing (TP) and CT reports, integrating industry-specific legal provisions, transitional relief claims, and valuation insights aligned with UAE CT law.
  • Represented clients in FTA correspondences, penalty waiver requests, and post-registration corrections — resulting in successful resolution of multiple high-stakes cases.
  • Collaborated with internal audit teams to develop tailored audit checklists and risk assessments for schools, trading, logistics, and service sector clients.
  • Supported operational reporting, marketing strategy, and internal templates — contributing to enhanced client onboarding and proposal quality.
